summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Checkout balance check now works correctly. Backend returns HTTP 402 'Outstanding balance: X.XX' when booking has total_amount > paid_amount. GET/PUT /api/pms/guests/{id} endpoints added and working. Frontend RoomsTab displays room cards with guest info, balance displays, C/In buttons, and identity dialog. No C/Out buttons visible because no bookings have checkout=today.
critical_code_review_comments: frontdesk_service.py checkout() correctly calculates booking_balance = total_amount - paid_amount at line 146-148
effective_balance = max(total_balance, booking_balance) at line 149 ensures both folio and booking balance are checked
Returns 402 OUTSTANDING_BALANCE when effective_balance > 0.01 and force=false
RoomsTab.js handleCheckOutClick() correctly shows balance warning dialog when balance > 0.01
Dialog shows 'Odeme Al' (Take Payment) button but NO force checkout option - correct per requirements
GET /api/pms/guests/{guest_id} endpoint at routers/pms.py line 725-742 returns single guest
PUT /api/pms/guests/{guest_id} endpoint at routers/pms.py line 745-773 updates identity fields

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 3 critical checkout tests passed + 2 guest endpoint tests passed
success_rate.frontend: 100% - RoomsTab loads with 41 rooms, 3 guest sections, 3 balance displays, 2 C/In buttons, identity dialog works

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 checkout balance fix verified. Checkout returns 402 when balance > 0. GET/PUT guest endpoints working. RoomsTab shows room cards, guest info, balance displays. To test C/Out button and balance warning dialog, need a booking with status=checked_in AND check_out=today (none exist currently).

frontend_rooms_tab.identity_dialog: PASS - opens on guest name click

frontdesk_service.py_line_145-157.after: Checks both folio balance AND booking_balance (total_amount - paid_amount), uses max of both

RoomsTab.js_handleCheckOutClick.description: Shows balance warning dialog when balance > 0.01, dialog has 'Odeme Al' and 'Kapat' buttons only (no force checkout)
